name: vp_whale_alert
description: Real-time whale activity monitor for VP tokens on Base chain. Scans recent blocks for large transfers (>$10k), reports whale count, volume, transaction details, and directional signal (BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL). Also includes DEX pool liquidity and price impact data from DexScreener. Useful for agents needing on-chain flow intelligence before trade decisions.

symbol.description: VP token to monitor whale activity for

include_dex_pools.description: Include DEX pool liquidity and price data
